examples.title: Backpropagation
examples.code:
FOR EACH training_sample:
    forward_pass()
    compute_loss()
    backward_pass()
    UPDATE weights: w = w - η * ∇w
examples.explanation: Core loop showing forward/backward passes and weight update

examples.title: ReLU Implementation
examples.explanation: Returns element-wise max(0, x) for positive outputs

examples.title: CNN Model
examples.code:
model = Sequential([
    Conv2D(32, (3,3), activation='relu', input_shape=(28,28,1)),
    MaxPooling2D((2,2)),
    Flatten(),
    Dense(10, activation='softmax')
])

examples.title: Autoencoder
examples.code:
class Autoencoder(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.encoder = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(784, 128),
            nn.ReLU())
        self.decoder = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(128, 784),
            nn.Sigmoid())
examples.explanation: Encoder reduces input dimension, decoder reconstructs
